de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.rule

Class AbstractSideProofRule

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.rule.AbstractSideProofRule
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    BuiltInRule, Rule
    Direct Known Subclasses:
    ModalitySideProofRule, QuerySideProofRule

    public abstract class AbstractSideProofRule
extends Object
implements BuiltInRule
    Provides the basic functionality of BuiltInRule which computes something in a side proof.
    Author:
    Martin Hentschel

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      AbstractSideProofRule() 

    • Method Summary

      Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description

      Starts the side proof and extracts the result Term and conditions.

      Creates a constant which is used in the original Proof to store the computed result in form of QueryResult = ...

      Creates the result Function used in a predicate to compute the result in the side proof.
      boolean isApplicableOnSubTerms()
      protected static SequentFormula replace(PosInOccurrence pio, Term newTerm, Services services)
      Replaces the Term defined by the given PosInOccurrence with the given new Term.

    • Constructor Detail

      • AbstractSideProofRule

        public AbstractSideProofRule()

    • Method Detail

      • createResultConstant

        protected Function createResultConstant(Services services,
                            Sort sort)

        Creates a constant which is used in the original Proof to store the computed result in form of QueryResult = ...

        The used name is registered in the Namespace of the Services.

        Parameters:
        services - The Services to use-
        sort - The Sort to use.
        Returns:
        The created constant.

      • createResultFunction

        protected Function createResultFunction(Services services,
                            Sort sort)
        Creates the result Function used in a predicate to compute the result in the side proof.
        Parameters:
        services - The Services to use.
        sort - The Sort to use.
        Returns:
        The created result Function.

      • computeResultsAndConditions

        protected List<Triple<Term,Set<Term>,Node>> computeResultsAndConditions(Services services,
                                                            Goal goal,
                                                            ProofEnvironment sideProofEnvironment,
                                                            Sequent sequentToProve,
                                                            Function newPredicate)
                                                                 throws ProofInputException

        Starts the side proof and extracts the result Term and conditions.

        New used names are automatically added to the Namespace of the Services.

        Parameters:
        services - The Services to use.
        goal - The Goal on which this BuiltInRule should be applied on.
        sideProofEnvironment - The given ProofEnvironment of the side proof.
        sequentToProve - The Sequent to prove in a side proof.
        newPredicate - The Function which is used to compute the result.
        Returns:
        The found result Term and the conditions.
        Throws:
        ProofInputException - Occurred Exception.

      • replace

        protected static SequentFormula replace(PosInOccurrence pio,
                     Term newTerm,
                     Services services)
        Replaces the Term defined by the given PosInOccurrence with the given new Term.
        Parameters:
        pio - The PosInOccurrence which defines the Term to replace.
        newTerm - The new Term.
        Returns:
        The created SequentFormula in which the Term is replaced.

      • isApplicableOnSubTerms

        public boolean isApplicableOnSubTerms()
        Specified by:
        isApplicableOnSubTerms in interface BuiltInRule
